title: Delicate Aerated Italian Filo Pastry Calamarata
description: A nostalgic Italian dish featuring filo pastry, served in a calamarata form and cooked in a wok, this recipe combines fresh ingredients with a delicate aerated texture. It is a satvik-friendly, ssam-wrap inspired dish.
instructions: Preheat the wok over medium heat and brush it with olive oil.
Roll out the filo pastry and cut it into calamarata shapes.
In a bowl, mix together ricotta cheese, spinach, garlic, salt, black pepper, and lemon zest.
Place a spoonful of the cheese mixture onto the center of each filo pastry shape.
Fold the filo pastry into a ssam-wrap shape and press the edges to seal.
Place the filled pastry into the wok and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Repeat the process with the remaining pastry and filling.
Serve the calamarata hot, garnished with chopped fresh basil.
